confirmed_discrepancies.reason: CS material CUTLESS RUBBER+SS410 SHELL does not match BOM/SAP SS410.
CS material CA15 does not match BOM material HTS and SAP material FG260.
CS quantity (1) does not match BOM quantity (2), expected multiple of stage count.
CS material includes CF8M/SS410H, BOM is SS410H, SAP is CF8M. Potential mix-up.
CS quantity (2) does not match BOM quantity (9), which is not a simple multiple of stages (2 stages).
BOM material SS410T differs from SAP material SS410 (T condition). However, CS lacks material data.
CS material CI IS 210 GR FG260 does not exactly match BOM material FG260. Potential for subtle difference in specification interpretation.
CS quantity (1) does not match BOM quantity (10). For multi-stage pumps, CS should show quantity per stage, BOM total. Expected quantity of 2 for 2 stages.
CS material includes CA15/SS410, BOM is SS410, SAP is CA15. Potential for mix-up.
BOM material SS410T differs from SAP material SS410 (T condition). CS lacks material data.
CS quantity (1) does not match BOM quantity (7), which is not a simple multiple of stages (2 stages).
CS quantity (1) does not match BOM quantity (2). For a single pump, this should ideally match.
CS specifies CI IS 210 GR FG260, BOM specifies FG260 + COATING, SAP specifies FG260. The coating specification differs.
BOM material SS410T differs from SAP material SS410 (T condition). CS lacks material data.
